MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Ryan Arakawa, Esq., Gaba Guerrini Law Corporation, 888-391-1228, for Plaintiff, Kanner Diamonds, Inc.
No Other Appearances.

Matter is not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Kanner Diamonds, Inc.'s unopposed "motion for order setting aside notice of settlement and entering judgment pursuant to stipulation for entry of judgment pursuant to Cal. Civ. Proc. Code section 664.6" is granted. Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. Judge: Richard B.
